_comment: On the real machine, DI0 detects item arrival at the pick station.
This file defines simulated behavior for URSim testing.
delay         : Wait time in seconds (number or [min, max] for random)
DI0           : Item detect sensor (1=item arrived, 0=no item)
wait_register : {"reg": N, "value": V} Wait until register N equals value V

sequence.comment: Wait for UR to receive params (cycle_ready=1)
